title: T-021 — Sites list page (ms_sites_list) — MS-114
prompt:
# T-021 — Sites list page (ms_sites_list)

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10C MS-114
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/sites-screens.jsx:4-100 (ms_sites_list)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §ms_sites_list

## Goal
Server Component page /(multi-site)/sites with search + filter table of all sites matching prototype 1:1.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/page.tsx (RSC): queries Drizzle sites filtered by URL search params (type, active, search via ILIKE).
2. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/_components/sites-list-table.tsx: shadcn DataTable with columns [Code, Name, Country, Timezone, Type Badge, Module Count, Last Sync, Status, Actions].
3. Row click → router.push('/multi-site/sites/[siteId]') (T-022).
4. Edit/Decommission buttons: Admin-only (Server Component permission gate; not client-side hidden).
5. Export CSV Server Action returning StreamingResponse text/csv.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/_components/sites-list-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/_actions/export-sites-csv.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/_components/__tests__/sites-list-table.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/sites-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given the page renders, when compared to sites-screens.jsx:4-100 (ms_sites_list), then filter bar + table columns + row actions + Status badges match — RTL parity + Playwright trace.
2. Given URL ?search=apex, when page renders, then table is filtered to sites where code ILIKE '%apex%' OR name ILIKE '%apex%'.
3. Given user role != admin, when page renders, then Edit and Decommission buttons NOT rendered (Server Component permission gate).
4. Given Export CSV is clicked, when action settles, then a CSV with header [Code, Name, Country, Timezone, Type, Module Count, Last Sync, Status] is streamed with content-type 'text/csv'.
5. Given the sites list is empty for the active org, when page renders, then empty state (per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md) with Create Site CTA visible to Admin only.
6. Given row click on site_X, when navigation settles, then URL is /multi-site/sites/site_X.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + filter + Admin gate + CSV export + empty state + row navigation before page exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run sites-list-table' + Playwright sites-list.spec.ts.

## Prototype parity
Reference prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/sites-screens.jsx:4-100 (ms_sites_list).
Implement matching the canonical layout 1:1 per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. Capture RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace as closeout evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.
- Do not client-side hide Edit/Decommission — Server Component gate.
- Do not implement decommission inline — opens T-024 modal.
- Do not bypass site RLS — sites is org-scoped (T-002 policy), no x-site-id needed for list view.
- Do not export CSV synchronously for large tenants — stream rows.

Given URL ?search=apex, when page renders, then table filtered to ILIKE '%apex%'; AND given empty list when page renders then empty state per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md with Admin-only Create Site CTA.

Given Export CSV clicked, when action settles, then CSV with 8-col header streamed with content-type 'text/csv'.
test_strategy: RED: RTL parity + filter + Admin gate + CSV export + empty + row nav before page exists.
Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run sites-list-table' + Playwright sites-list.spec.ts.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
